footer.tagline: Sandra Loo - Civic Toilet Finder & Awareness Game

home.tagline: Find verified public toilets in Germany — and test your survival skills in our awareness game.
home.getting_started_text: Open the map, pick a nearby toilet, and help others by leaving a quick review or confirmation.
home.no_account_needed: No account needed. Anonymous usage is fully supported during this demo phase, and social login is intentionally not enabled yet.

feature.real_data_desc: All toilet locations are imported from OpenStreetMap and official city open-data portals. No invented data.
feature.community_reviews_desc: Rate cleanliness, lighting and paper supply. Report issues. Confirm toilet status for other visitors.
feature.awareness_game_desc: A stylized run-based survival game from a female perspective. Manage your bladder meter and avoid the igitt zone.

about.title: About This Project
about.subtitle: Sandra Loo is a community-first map project to help people find toilets faster and with fewer surprises.
about.non_profit_body: This app is built as a non-profit public-interest project. The goal is practical help, better visibility, and safer everyday mobility.
about.status_title: Why toilet status can change quickly
about.engage_body: You can help us improve this project by reporting issues, suggesting ideas, and contributing on GitHub.

toilets.title: Find a Toilet

trust_info.why_details: We surface the details that matter most when choosing a toilet: whether it is free or paid, whether it is accessible, and whether opening hours are available.
trust_info.freshness: Freshness shows how recently the record was updated, and recent confirmations help you gauge how active the listing is.
trust_info.source_reliability: Source reliability is still available as a technical backstop, mainly for sorting and maintenance.
trust_info.reports_help: Public toilets may still be dirty, closed, or missing supplies. We want user reports and confirmations to help track toilet state over time.
trust_info.institutional_note: Institutional places are suggestions only. Even when opening hours are shown, we cannot guarantee toilet access, free use, or public availability on site. If you’re unsure, check with the people on site.

toilets.none_with_filters: No toilets match your current filters. Try resetting filters or adjusting city/type/rating.
toilets.none_no_data: No data has been imported for this area yet. Run the import scripts to populate the database with real OpenStreetMap and city open-data.
toilets.no_reviews_yet: No reviews yet. Be the first!
toilets.no_reports_yet: No reports yet. That does not guarantee the toilet is clean, open, or fully stocked.
toilets.guide_not_guarantee: Please use as a guide, not a guarantee.
toilets.status_changes_body: Some public toilets may be dirty, closed, or out of paper. In the future we want users to help track cleanliness and availability so the map stays current.
toilets.status_changes_institutional: Institutional places like libraries, civic buildings, or universities are only suggestions based on public data. We do not guarantee they are always open, free to use, or suitable for toilet access. If you are unsure, check with the people on site.
toilets.geolocation_not_supported: Geolocation is not supported on this device.
toilets.geolocation_permission_error: Could not access your location. Please allow location permission and try again.
toilets.route_requires_location: Current location is required to calculate a route.
toilets.routing_unavailable: Routing service is currently unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
toilets.mobile_marker_limit_note: Showing {count} nearby markers on mobile for faster loading.
toilets.navigation_help_location: Location is required. Use My location first.
toilets.help_controls: Drag with one finger to move the map. Pinch with two fingers to zoom. Tap a marker to select a toilet.
toilets.help_consistency: Navigate and Open in OSM require location. If disabled, tap My location first.
toilets.help_stuck_body: Try tapping My location, then zoom out and drag again. If it still does not respond, close the filter panel and reload the page.
toilets.status_map_density: Tap to zoom in for denser map details
toilets.map_hint_body: Drag the map to explore nearby toilets. The details card collapses while moving so navigation stays focused.

game.title: The Game
game.description: Each step gives you three toilet choices. Every move raises the bladder meter first, then your selected stop changes the situation. Every 10 steps, you hit a bonus shop milestone.
game.leaderboard_wip_notice: The game is still work in progress. Leaderboard behavior may change as gameplay evolves.
game.ready_card_cafe_desc: Usually the best comfort and score mix.
game.ready_card_park_desc: Big relief, big igitt, pure desperation.
game.milestone_choose_shop_body: You reached step {step}. Pick one shop to gain an extra bonus and a score boost.
game.next_step_choose_toilet_title: Pick the toilet for this step
game.next_step_choose_toilet_body: Use the 3D scene to choose the destination for this step. The bladder meter rises first, then your selected toilet changes the outcome.
game.no_extras_yet: No extras yet. Reach the next milestone shop to power up the run.
game.last_step_pressure_note: Step pressure added {count} bladder before the toilet effect kicked in.
game.no_step_taken_yet: No step taken yet. The first choice starts the whole route.

fps.controls_keyboard_confirm: Press Enter or E to confirm

game.loop_note: The loop is now fully step-based. Free roaming is gone from the main flow so every decision pushes the run forward.
game.ready_text: Survive the route, manage bladder and igitt, and hit a shop milestone at step 10 before the final stretch.

reason.bladder: The bladder meter maxed out before the next stop.
reason.igitt: The igitt level got too high to keep going.

game.cleared_steps: You cleared all {steps} steps and made it through the milestone stretch.
game.no_scores_text: Be the first to complete a run and claim the top spot!

admin.title: Admin
admin.description: Moderation and import inspection. Authentication required in production.
admin.run_import_scripts_hint: Run the import scripts to populate the database.
admin.moderation_workflow_soon: Full moderation workflow is planned for a future release.
admin.no_reports_text: User reports will appear here once users start submitting them.
